import YourSketch from '@/components/sketches/YourSketch'

open with the picture, behavior, or confusion that makes the topic worth studying.
do not start with a formal definition unless the definition itself is the point.

name what the reader should be trying to understand.

---

### the setup

introduce the objects and symbols. define every symbol before using it in a formula.
keep the assumptions visible.

<div className="math-highlight">readable formula or identity</div>

---

### the picture

explain what the sketch shows and what the reader should look for.

<div className="not-prose my-8">
  <YourSketch />
</div>

name the specific visual change that carries the idea.

---

### the key step

derive the main relationship or algorithm from the setup. if a move is not obvious,
say so directly.

---

### why it matters

connect the idea to later lessons, applications, or a larger mathematical structure.

---

### what this doesn't cover yet

name the boundary honestly. say what is being deferred and why.
